old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-n31b","title":"Research T-Echo GNSS 1PPS routing","description":"Determine from LilyGO/Xinyuan manufacturer-grade artifacts whether each T-Echo hardware revision routes its GNSS module 1PPS output to the nRF52840 or an accessible pad/header, with exact revision/module evidence and source URLs.","acceptance_criteria":"Report revision-specific positive proof, negative schematic proof, and absence of evidence using only official sources.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-20T18:55:30.794838Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-20T18:55:30.794838Z"}
